core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.general_idea: Change behavior to silently add a port to the reserved list if reservation fails, instead of throwing a RuntimeException.
core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.human_impl: Commented out `throw new RuntimeException(...)` and replaced with `reserved.add(Integer.parseInt(property)); return;`

core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.general_idea: Correct the field iteration to use the current class in the hierarchy loop instead of the original class to properly detect annotations in superclasses.
core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.human_impl: Changed 'clazz.getDeclaredFields()' to 'current.getDeclaredFields()' inside the do-while loop.

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Replace the manual RestTemplate bean configuration with an OpenAPI-generated PetApi client to utilize a typed API interface.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Removed RestTemplateBuilder/RestTemplate imports and bean; added ApiClient/PetApi imports and a new bean method that instantiates PetApi with a configured base path.

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Introduce a configurable URL property for the API client base path using Spring's @Value annotation.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Added @Value("${my.url}") private String myUrl; and used it to set the base path on the ApiClient.

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Add SLF4J logging to the configuration class to track the initialization of the API client.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Added Logger field and logger.info call inside the client bean method.

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Replace manual RestTemplate usage with a generated OpenAPI client (PetApi) to simplify HTTP interaction.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Removed RestTemplate, URI, and RequestEntity logic; injected PetApi and called petApi.addPet(inputPet).

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Update method signature to throw the specific ApiException from the new client library instead of generic Exception.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Changed throws clause from 'throws Exception' to 'throws ApiException'.

examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Switch to using model classes from the new generated client package.
examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: Replaced imports and usage of org.openapitools.model.Pet with com.github.skjolber.pet.model.Pet and Category.

examples/demo/src/test/java/com/example/.general_idea: Replace deprecated MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE with MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE to align with modern Spring Boot standards.
Simplify Mockito stubbing by using static import any() instead of ArgumentMatchers.any().
Explicitly specify the path for the mocked endpoint to ensure correct routing in tests.
Update test cases to verify specific object properties and mock interactions instead of just checking for null or success.
Add test coverage for scenarios where the service throws an ApiException.
Update import statement for the Pet model class to reflect a package structure change.
Add import for ApiException to handle exceptions thrown by the service.
Specify the path attribute in the MockEndpoint annotation to correctly map the mock endpoint.
Modify test to catch ApiException instead of asserting null return value, reflecting a change in service behavior.

jetty/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/.general_idea: Update Jetty imports and configuration types from the legacy webapp package to the ee10 package to align with Spring Boot 4 and Jakarta EE 10 requirements.
Update imports and class hierarchy to use the Jetty 12 EE10 API, which is required for Spring Boot 4 compatibility.
jetty/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/.human_impl: Changed imports from org.eclipse.jetty.webapp to org.eclipse.jetty.ee10.webapp and added super(new Builder()) call.

jetty/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/.general_idea: Update Jetty imports and usage from the legacy `org.eclipse.jetty.servlet` package to the Jakarta EE 10 compatible `org.eclipse.jetty.ee10.servlet` package.
Update WebAppContext import to use the Jakarta EE 10 compatible `org.eclipse.jetty.ee10.webapp` package.
Adjust the runtime cast of the servlet context to use the new `ServletContextApi` interface provided by the Jetty EE10 module.

junit5/core-junit5/src/main/java/com/git.general_idea: Implement AutoCloseable interface to ensure the embedded server is destroyed when the extension is closed.
junit5/core-junit5/src/main/java/com/git.human_impl: class MockitoEndpointExtension implements ..., AutoCloseable { ... public void close() throws Exception { server.destroy(); } }

junit5/core-junit5/src/main/java/com/git.general_idea: Register the extension instance in the global JUnit 5 store to manage lifecycle or state across tests.

junit5/jetty/src/test/java/com/github/sk.general_idea: Replace the deprecated APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE with APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE to align with Spring Framework 6.x standards.
Replace the deprecated APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE constant with APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE to align with Spring Framework 6.x changes.
